This is public place. you can find lot of blackberry around the park's pond. This park is one of best park in Gwinnett county, Georgia. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: June-July.
4205 River Green Pkwy, Duluth, GA 30096, USA

Trees are on AGCO property by the road, lots of pecans end up in the road. Trees seem healthy, all lower branches are kept pruned back.
